feature_name: Pull-to-refresh cleanup: remove scope-creep refresh button, expand emoji set, investigate E2E flakiness, update docs

tasks.title: Remove scope-creep Refresh button from +layout.svelte
tasks.description: Remove the 'Refresh' button element (on:click={refreshNow}) and the refreshNow function from web/src/routes/+layout.svelte. Do NOT remove the .refresh-btn CSS class or its :hover rule — they are shared with the Copy button which must remain. Do NOT touch the Copy button, copyTasks, copyLabel, setCopyLabel, collectCopyLines, or copyResetTimer.
tasks.definition_of_done: Refresh button and refreshNow function are gone. Copy button still renders and works. .refresh-btn CSS retained. All quality gates pass (lint, check, vitest, cargo fmt, cargo clippy).

tasks.title: Expand PULL_EMOJIS to 15 entries and update unit tests
tasks.description: In web/src/lib/components/pullToRefreshUtils.ts, replace the PULL_EMOJIS array (currently 3 entries) with exactly these 15: ['🚀', '⚙️', '🔄', '🎯', '💪', '🏆', '🌟', '📌', '⚡', '✨', '💨', '🔥', '🏁', '💥', '🧹']. Do NOT change REFRESH_EMOJI ('⏳') or pickRandomPullEmoji() logic. Update unit tests in PullToRefresh.test.ts to assert PULL_EMOJIS.length === 15 and that every element is one of the 15 specified values.
tasks.definition_of_done: PULL_EMOJIS has exactly 15 entries matching the spec. REFRESH_EMOJI is unchanged. pickRandomPullEmoji logic is unchanged. Unit tests assert array length and membership. All quality gates pass.

tasks.title: Fix E2E flakiness: CDP browser guard and webServer readiness
tasks.description: In web/tests/e2e/pull-to-refresh.spec.ts, add test.skip(browserName !== 'chromium', 'CDP required for raw touch simulation') to the first test ('pull-to-refresh gesture triggers sync @smoke'). Update the test's destructured parameters to include browserName. The second test ('accessible refresh button') is unchanged. In web/playwright.config.ts, add url: 'http://localhost:4173' to the webServer block for explicit readiness detection. After applying fixes, run the full Playwright suite 3 consecutive times and document results in the exec plan progress log.
tasks.definition_of_done: CDP test skips on non-Chromium browsers. webServer config has explicit url. Full Playwright suite passes 3 consecutive runs without retries. No tests deleted or unconditionally skipped. All quality gates pass.

tasks.title: Update ARCHITECTURE.md, FRONTEND.md, and RELIABILITY.md with PTR documentation
tasks.description: Add pull-to-refresh coverage to three docs: (1) docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — in Client Architecture section, add a bullet describing PullToRefresh as a gesture-driven sync trigger entry point. (2) docs/FRONTEND.md — add PullToRefresh.svelte and pullToRefreshUtils.ts to component/utility tables, note the data/-import boundary constraint. (3) docs/RELIABILITY.md — document the overscroll-behavior-y: none rule on <main> required to prevent browser native PTR conflict. Ensure all three docs are consistent with each other and with the shipped implementation.
tasks.definition_of_done: All three docs reference PTR components accurately. overscroll-behavior-y rule documented. Layer boundary constraint noted. Docs are internally consistent. All quality gates pass.

history.note: Feature initiated: 4-item cleanup batch following pull-to-refresh feature — (1) remove unwanted refresh button, (2) expand PTR emoji set, (3) investigate E2E flakiness, (4) docs update
Stage advanced to discovery — routing to product-manager for requirements gathering
Stage advanced to design — routing to principal-engineer for technical design
Stage advanced to tasks — EM broke design into 4 independent tasks matching the 4 cleanup items
Stage advanced to implementation — routing task-1 (remove Refresh button) to software-developer
